name: seedance-ugc
promptFormula: single camera move and shot size
dialogue or caption budget when audio is enabled
constraints: prefer strong first-frame or reference-image anchors when available
avoid stacking too many camera moves into one short clip
keep spoken dialogue short enough for the clip duration
separate still-image composition prompts from Seedance motion prompts
adaptationChecklist: change topic and offer while preserving beat rhythm
preserve only the useful aesthetic constraints
bind character identity sheets before director-mode execution
record route, output, timing, and cost telemetry after live generation
